testcase.name: user should get success message when user clicks on Submit button from Gold loan application tab

failure.message: expected:<[]> but was:<[You have successfully submitted your details, Thank you.]>

testcase.failure:
Given User is logged in "39915194" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on gold loan page..............................................passed And Clicks on Select State dropdown "MAHARASHTRA"...........................passed And Clicks on Select City dropdown "Nagpur".................................passed And Clicks on Loan Amount field "15000".....................................passed And Clicks on terms and conditions checkbox.................................passed And Clicks on Submit button.................................................passed Then user should get success message popup "You have successfully submitted your details, Thank you.".failed And Clicks on ok button.....................................................skipped
StackTrace: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: expected:<[]> but was:<[You have successfully submitted your details, Thank you.]> at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117) at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:146) at stepDefinitions.GL_Validations_Steps.success_popup(GL_Validations_Steps.java:98) at ✽.user should get success message popup "You have successfully submitted your details, Thank you."(classpath:Features/FrontEnd/B2C/GL_Validation.feature:12)

testcase.name: user should get error message when enters incorrect Loan amount
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in "39915194" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on gold loan page..............................................passed And Clicks on Select State dropdown "MAHARASHTRA"...........................passed And Clicks on Select City dropdown "Nagpur".................................passed And Clicks on Loan Amount field "1500"......................................passed Then user should get error message on screen "Loan Amount Should Be Between Rs 5000 and 25,00,000".passed

testcase.name: user should get company address after selecting state and city
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in "39915194" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on gold loan page..............................................passed And Clicks on Select State dropdown "MAHARASHTRA"...........................passed And Clicks on Select City dropdown "Nagpur".................................passed Then user should get company address on screen..............................passed

testcase.name: user should be redirected Application Form tab when user clicks on Apply Now button from Features & Benefits
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in "39915194" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on personal loan page..........................................passed And Clicks on Features & Benefits tab.......................................passed And Clicks on Apply now button..............................................passed Then user should be redirected to Application Form tab......................passed

testcase.name: user should be redirected Application Form tab when user clicks on Apply Now button from Eligibility Criteria
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in "50006944" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on personal loan page..........................................passed And Clicks on Eligibility Criteria tab......................................passed And Clicks on Apply now button..............................................passed Then user should be redirected to Application Form tab......................passed

testcase.name: user should be redirected Application Form tab when user clicks on Apply Now button from Documents Required

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //a[@href='#portfolio'] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: Validation message should be displayed when Monthly salary is less than 15,000
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in "50006944" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on personal loan page..........................................passed And user enters Monthly Salary less than fifteen thousand "14999"...........passed Then validation message should be displayed "Your monthly salary should be Rs. 15,000 or above".passed

testcase.name: Validation message should not be displayed when Monthly salary is more than 15,000
testcase.system-out: Given User is logged in "50006944" "Bajaj@123"..............................passed When user is on personal loan page..........................................passed And user enters Monthly Salary more than fifteen thousand "15000"...........passed Then validation message should not be displayed.............................passed

testcase.name: Validation message should not be displayed when Monthly salary is more than 15,000 2
